current_failure_analysis.description: Backend launcher prioritizes LaunchBox Plugin bridge (localhost:9999) but plugin is not running during smoke test
evidence: Backend log shows: 'Plugin health check failed: Request failed after 2 attempts'
Launcher fallback chain: 1) Plugin → 2) Auto-detected emulator → 3) Direct execution
Only MAME launches succeed (likely has working fallback path)

secondary_issues.description: When running from WSL, paths are in /mnt/a/ format but Windows .exe files need A:\ format
secondary_issues.impact: RetroArch cannot find ROMs if paths not converted
secondary_issues.current_mitigation: Code has _convert_wsl_paths_for_windows() function but may not cover all cases

secondary_issues.description: Backend may not be parsing Emulators.xml correctly to get emulator paths and command lines
secondary_issues.impact: Cannot build proper launch commands without LaunchBox XML data
secondary_issues.evidence: No clear XML parsing in launcher.py for emulator configs

why_mame_works: MAME may have hardcoded fallback path in backend
MAME emulator path is simpler (no core loading required)
MAME adapter may be registered in ADAPTERS registry
why_retroarch_fails: Backend may not be parsing LaunchBox Emulators.xml for RetroArch config
Path conversion issues (WSL /mnt/a/ vs Windows A:\)
Core path resolution (-L parameter with relative path may fail)
No fallback adapter registered for RetroArch platforms in launcher_registry.py

recommended_fixes.description: Launch LaunchBox with plugin enabled on port 9999 to enable primary launch method
recommended_fixes.implementation: Manual - open LaunchBox.exe before testing launches
recommended_fixes.impact: HIGH - Enables most reliable launch method

recommended_fixes.description: Register RetroArch adapter in launcher_registry.py for common platforms (NES, SNES, N64, etc.)
recommended_fixes.impact: HIGH - Provides fallback when plugin unavailable

recommended_fixes.description: Add emulator config parser to read Emulators.xml and build launch commands
recommended_fixes.impact: MEDIUM - Enables auto-detection method in fallback chain

recommended_fixes.description: Enable direct emulator execution method in .env
Ensure _convert_wsl_paths_for_windows() is called for all paths when running from WSL
recommended_fixes.implementation: Code review - check launcher.py spawn calls
recommended_fixes.impact: MEDIUM - Fixes Windows exe execution from WSL

steps: 2. Enable the web API plugin (if not already enabled)
3. Verify plugin is running by visiting http://localhost:9999/health
4. Keep LaunchBox running in background during tests
5. Retry launching non-MAME games from frontend
immediate_no_code_fixes.expected_result: All platforms should now launch via plugin bridge

immediate_no_code_fixes.fix: Set Environment Variable for Direct Execution
immediate_no_code_fixes.expected_result: Backend will attempt direct emulator execution as fallback

next_steps.immediate: Try starting LaunchBox.exe with plugin to enable primary launch method
next_steps.short_term: Review backend/services/adapters/ to add RetroArch adapter registration
next_steps.long_term: Implement full LaunchBox Emulators.xml parsing for auto-detection method
